security.title: ISO Certified Data Centers

questions.question: What is a VPS?
questions.answer: A Virtual Private Server (VPS) is a virtualized server that mimics a dedicated server environment within a shared server. It provides dedicated resources like CPU and RAM.

questions.question: How is VPS distinct from Shared Hosting?
questions.answer: Unlike shared hosting where resources are shared among many users, a VPS offers dedicated resources and greater control, ensuring your website performance is isolated from others.

questions.question: Do I get root access?
questions.answer: Yes, our VPS hosting plans come with full root access, giving you complete control over your server environment to install customizations and configure settings.

questions.question: Can I upgrade my VPS plan?
questions.answer: Absolutely. You can easily scale your resources up or down as your business needs change, ensuring you always have the performance you require.
